docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLER, ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAGE, JEANNETTE PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE HIS CLAIM FOR DAMAGES AS AGAINST HIS FORMER TENANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO BE HEARD AS A COUNTER CLAIM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF ROBERT KELLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEANNETTE PAGE IS PRESENT. PARTIES ORALLY STIPULATE TO ALLOW THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THEIR CASE. HEARD WITH CASE CSM-23-866689. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,800.00 FILED BY KELLER, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE, JEANNETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2023 - CONTINUED TO BE HEARD AS A COUNTER CLAIM TO JUN-06-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROBERT KELLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEANETTE PAGE IS NOT PRESENT. COURT FINDS DEFENDANT JEANNETTE PAGE HAS AN OPEN CASE FILED AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF IN SMALL CLAIMS CASE# CSM-23-866689 JEANNETTE PAGE V. ROBERT KELLER WHICH IS SET FOR HEARING ON JUNE-06-2023 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT ORDERS THIS CASE CONTINUED TO BE HEARD AS A COUNTER CLAIM TO JUN-06-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 506. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT L WONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $97. SERVED APR-26-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE, JEANNETTE
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE JUN-14-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
